div.class: row rounded-2 border border-light-subtle px-2 py-2
row border border-light-subtle rounded-2 align-items-center padding: 1%;

td.style: border:1px solid #e5e7e9; padding:4px; text-align:left; white-space:normal; word-break:break-word;

t.t-value: o.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.tax_line_id and l.tax_line_id.tributos_hacienda.codigo and l.tax_line_id.tributos_hacienda.codigo.upper() not in excluded_codes_tributos)
sum(abs(l.amount_currency or l.balance) for l in tributos_lines)

tr.td: Descuento global en ventas no sujetas:

t.t-foreach: o.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.tax_line_id and l.tax_line_id.tributos_hacienda and l.tax_line_id.tributos_hacienda.codigo and l.tax_line_id.tributos_hacienda.codigo.upper() not in excluded_codes)
